dict.string: Daily Health Score reads your sleep, dietary fiber, exercise minutes, and heart rate variability from Apple Health to calculate your daily score and show sleep HRV trends. Data stays on your device.
Daily Health Score does not write data to Apple Health. This description is required because HealthKit may reference write APIs; the app only reads sleep, fiber, and exercise to calculate your score.
Daily Health Score does not use your location. This description is required because Apple Health libraries may reference location APIs; the app never collects or stores your location.
Daily Health Score does not use your location. This description is required because Apple Health libraries may reference location APIs; the app never collects or stores your location.
Daily Health Score does not use your location. This description is required because Apple Health libraries may reference location APIs; the app never collects or stores your location.
Daily Health Score can send neutral reminders for your SMART goals.
